name: Hamburger Fischsalat (Hamburg-style Fish Sala
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------SAUCE---------------------------
2 tbsp Mayonnaise
2 tbsp Sour Cream
2 tsp Lemon Juice
1 tsp Dijon-style Mustard
1/2 tsp Salt
1/4 tsp White Pepper
--------------------------GARNISH--------------------------
1 Large, Hard Cooked Egg
Canned Beets, Sliced
Fillets may be fresh or frozen. They can include cod, turbot, or haddock.
+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
++++++++++++++++++ Melt butter in a frying pan over medium heat. Place fish fillets in the pan and pour hot water over them until they are just covered. Reduce heat to low and simmer gently for 10 minutes, uncovered. Meanwhile, slice the hard cooked eggs and pickles. Drain the fish, cool it, and cut into cubes. Prepare the salad sauce by blending mayonnaise, sour cream, lemon juice, mustard, salt, and pepper until smooth. In a large bowl, gently mix the fish cubes, egg pieces, pickle slices, and capers. Divide the fish mixture among individual serving dishes and spoon the salad sauce over top. Chill for 30 minutes. To garnish, cut the remaining hard cooked egg into eight pieces and chop the beet slices. Arrange the garnish on each serving dish before serving immediately.
